text: 自分死亡5150
相手死亡5150
Begin5150
Success5150
Failure5150
YouDied5150
PartnerDied5150
Evolution5150

/ci1 1 おう、ちょうどいいところに！
悪いが手伝ってくれるか！

/ci2 1 っしゃあ！　やったぜ！
ありがとな！
気合いが空回りしちまったか……

くっそ……！
情けねえ姿見せちまった……！

無理すんじゃねえ、シルバ！
少しそこで休んでろ！

/ci1 1 Oh-hoh, perfect timing! Hate to bother you, but
could you help us!?
/ci2 1 Woo-HOO! We did it! Thank you!
My fighting spirit accomplished nothing...?
Damn it, what a pathetic display...

You've pushed yourself too hard, Silva! Take a
breather!

/toge /ci1 4 お、いいところに！
ちょっと手伝ってくれや！
俺たちだけじゃ厳しくってよ！

/toge /ci2 4 やったぜ、さすがじゃねえか！
手助け頼んで、正解だったぜ！

/mn13 くそっ！　なんてざまだ……！
しょうがねぇ、出直そうぜ！

/mn7 ちっくしょう、やられちまった！
悪い……あとは頼んだぜ……

シルバ、無理はするな！
ここは俺たちが何とかしてやるぜ！

/toge /ci1 4 Hey, great timing! Help us out real quick! This is
a tough fight with just the two of us!

/toge /ci2 4 We did it! I knew we would! Asking for help was
the right thing to do!

/mn13 Damn! The hell was that! Well no use beatin'
ourselves up. We'll get 'em next time!

/mn7 Damnation, I've been defeated! Sorry, you'll have to
do the rest...

Silva, don't try to be a hero! We'll handle
the rest!

/ci2 2 おうよ！
イベントの邪魔する不届き者は
俺たちでぶっ倒してやろうぜ！

/ci2 2 イベントは若い奴らに任せて
俺たちは邪魔者を倒してくるぜ！

/ci3 2 悪い……
しくじっちまったな……

/mn5 ぐっ、やられちまった！
すまねえ……
少し休ませてもらうぜ……

/mn18 なんだと……！
よくもやってくれたな！
まとめてぶっ倒す！

/ci2 2 Right! Let's smash these impertinent, interfering
rapscallions into the ground!

/ci2 2 Leave the event itself to the youngsters.
We'll cut down anyone who tries to interfere!
/ci3 2 Terrible...we've failed...

/mn5 Guh, I've been defeated! I'm sorry... Let me rest
for a little while....
/mn18 What...! How dare they! I'll crush them all!
